lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A0：data-free，不使用校准样本或激活统计。
scope: weight-only uniform quantization baseline
gradient_training_signal: none; deterministic rounding from weight ranges
updated_state: quantized weight codes and scale/zero-point only
objective: local rounding error without calibration objective
payload_must_count: packed weight codes; scale/zero-point; group metadata; padding; file/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: same model, tensors, group size, clipping rule, excluded tensors, actual packed bytes, and evaluation set
evidence_note: Baseline definition; no single canonical paper or official repository is asserted.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: post-training weight-only quantization
gradient_training_signal: no backpropagation; calibration activations form an approximate Hessian
updated_state: quantized codes while processing columns; frozen dense model
objective: approximately minimize layer reconstruction error under second-order weighting
payload_must_count: packed codes; scale/zero-point; grouping/permutation metadata; unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match model, calibration data/tokens, bit/group configuration, tensor coverage, actual bytes, and evaluation
evidence_note: Scope and optimization characterization follow the paper and official implementation.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: post-training weight-only quantization
gradient_training_signal: no backpropagation; calibration activation statistics guide salient-weight protection and scaling
updated_state: quantized codes and equivalent/foldable channel scales; dense weights otherwise frozen
objective: reduce quantization error by activation-aware rescaling and clipping/search
payload_must_count: packed codes; scale/zero-point; any non-folded channel scales; tensor exclusions; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match calibration, group size, clipping/search, protected tensors, folded-state verification, actual bytes, and evaluation
evidence_note: Paper and official repository support a calibration-statistics, no-gradient PTQ classification.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: post-training weight pruning
gradient_training_signal: no backpropagation; calibration activations form a Hessian approximation
updated_state: sparse weight values and support; dense model frozen
objective: second-order layer reconstruction while removing weights
payload_must_count: surviving values; mask/index or N:M metadata; block metadata; padding/header/alignment; any dense exceptions
comparison_conditions: match sparsity structure, calibration, model/tensor coverage, deployable sparse encoding bytes, kernels, and evaluation
evidence_note: The paper and official code establish the one-shot Hessian-informed pruning scope.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: post-training weight pruning
gradient_training_signal: no backpropagation; calibration activation magnitudes score weights
updated_state: sparse values and support; dense model frozen
objective: retain weights with large weight-times-activation importance
payload_must_count: surviving values; mask/index or N:M metadata; padding/header/alignment; dense exceptions
comparison_conditions: match sparsity pattern, calibration data, tensor coverage, actual sparse artifact bytes, kernels, and evaluation
evidence_note: Classification follows the paper's pruning metric and official implementation.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only quantization with sparse outliers
gradient_training_signal: no model backpropagation; calibration-based second-order sensitivity separates outliers
updated_state: quantized bulk weights plus sparse high-precision outliers
objective: minimize reconstruction loss while preserving sensitive outliers
payload_must_count: bulk codes/scales/zero-points; outlier values and indices; permutations; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match outlier policy, calibration, exact tensor coverage, serialized sparse/index overhead, kernels, and evaluation
evidence_note: Hybrid payload and second-order outlier treatment are documented by the primary sources.

lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: weight-only PTQ with non-uniform codebooks and sparse outliers
gradient_training_signal: no full-model parameter training, but the main sensitivity path performs backward in a separate framework to save squared loss gradients as a Fisher-based sensitivity checkpoint
updated_state: non-uniform weight indices/codebooks plus sparse components
objective: sensitivity-weighted quantization error with outlier separation
payload_must_count: indices; codebooks; scales; sparse outlier values/indices; tensor exceptions; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match the gradient corpus/objective and backward budget, codebook/outlier configuration, artifact bytes, runtime format, and evaluation; do not compare this main Fisher path as no-backward A1 PTQ
evidence_note: The official quantization README requires a gradient-square checkpoint before sensitivity-weighted k-means; encoder-side gradients are not deployed, but their backward computation places the main path in B.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ plus low-rank residual repair
gradient_training_signal: no gradient training; activation-aware statistics can shape a low-rank error decomposition
updated_state: base quantized weights and low-rank correction factors
objective: approximate the quantization residual in a low-rank subspace relevant to activations
payload_must_count: base codes/scales/zero-points; both low-rank factors with dtype/scales; rank metadata; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match rank, factor dtype, calibration, base codec, actual repair bytes, tensor coverage, and evaluation
evidence_note: Low-rank repair state must be charged in addition to the base codec.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ plus low-rank error reconstruction
gradient_training_signal: closed-form/statistical reconstruction without end-to-end weight fine-tuning
updated_state: quantized base and low-rank reconstruction factors
objective: minimize activation-weighted output reconstruction error
payload_must_count: base codec; low-rank factor values/dtypes/scales; rank and grouping metadata; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match calibration covariance, rank/dtype, base quantizer, serialized bytes, and evaluation protocol
evidence_note: Method scope and reconstruction objective follow the primary paper and repository.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ with calibration-oriented low-rank compensation
gradient_training_signal: no full-model backpropagation in the PTQ repair stage; calibration eigenspace guides repair
updated_state: quantized base and low-rank compensation factors
objective: reconstruct quantization error in activation-sensitive eigen-directions
payload_must_count: base codec; low-rank factors and their dtype/scales; eigenspace/rank metadata if stored; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match calibration, rank, factor precision, base codec, actual bytes, tensor coverage, and evaluation
evidence_note: The official paper/repository motivate an activation-sensitive low-rank repair comparison.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: weight-only compression; main reported pipeline includes fine-tuning
gradient_training_signal: reported pipeline uses optimization/fine-tuning after quantization; not a frozen closed-form-only PTQ control
updated_state: lattice-quantized weights and pipeline-tuned state
objective: second-order proxy plus end-to-end recovery in the reported pipeline
payload_must_count: lattice bitstream; scales; RHT signs/seeds; codebooks/decoder state; tuned or unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: can compare deployment frontier only after matching actual bytes and disclosing fine-tuning data/steps/compute; not strict frozen-PTQ evidence
evidence_note: Placed in C because the main official pipeline includes fine-tuning; codec components remain informative.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ with incoherence processing and trellis coding
gradient_training_signal: no end-to-end fine-tuning asserted for the core PTQ path; calibration/second-order information guides quantization
updated_state: trellis-coded weights and decode state
objective: minimize second-order weighted quantization distortion under a compressed trellis representation
payload_must_count: trellis streams/state/decoder parameters; scales; RHT signs/seeds; tensor exceptions; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match code rate, decoder state, calibration, transform representation, serialized bytes, kernels, and evaluation
evidence_note: Trellis decoder and transform state are part of deployable payload, not free metadata.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: weight-only additive-codebook compression; main reported pipeline includes blockwise and end-to-end optimization
gradient_training_signal: gradient optimization and end-to-end KL-distillation are used in the main pipeline
updated_state: additive code indices, codebooks, scales, and optimized quantization state
objective: block reconstruction followed by global output-distribution recovery
payload_must_count: additive-code indices; all codebooks; scales; partition/scheme metadata; unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: deployment frontier can be compared at actual bytes, but training data/steps/compute must be disclosed and it is not frozen PTQ
evidence_note: Classified by the main reported training pipeline rather than by nominal weight bit rate alone.

lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: calibration-optimized PTQ for weights and optionally activations
gradient_training_signal: calibration backpropagation optimizes clipping and learnable equivalent transformations; dense pretrained weights remain frozen
updated_state: quantizer clipping/scale state and transform parameters, folded when supported
objective: block/layer output reconstruction on calibration samples
payload_must_count: weight codes/scales/zero-points; activation quantizer state if in scope; any non-folded LET parameters; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match W-only versus W/A scope, calibration tokens, gradient steps, updated variables, compute, actual exported bytes, and evaluation
evidence_note: The learned PTQ parameters require lane B even though the pretrained dense weights are frozen.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: rotation-assisted PTQ for weights and activations/KV depending protocol
gradient_training_signal: pretrained base weights are frozen, but the official optimized-rotation path trains global R1 and per-layer R2 with Hugging Face Trainer on WikiText2 causal-LM loss
updated_state: global and per-layer rotation parameters are learned under full-model causal-LM behavior; rotations may be fused only when export proves equivalence
objective: global causal language-model loss under simulated low-bit quantization
payload_must_count: codes/scales/zero-points; stored rotation matrices or signs/seeds/factors; unfused runtime transforms; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: treat optimized SpinQuant as a global-recovery track: match W/A/KV scope, corpus/tokens/epochs/optimizer, rotation export/folding, actual artifact bytes, kernels, and evaluation; do not rank it as local-reconstruction B PTQ
evidence_note: Official optimize_rotation.py freezes the dense base but calls Trainer.train() on causal-LM data; the global task objective places this optimized path in C. Learned rotations are not free unless demonstrably fused or regenerated from charged metadata.

variant: default; fused channel scales and rank-4 LoRA
lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: calibration-optimized W-only or W/A PTQ with inter-layer windows and intra-layer incremental quantization
gradient_training_signal: AdamW optimizes local calibration reconstruction on 128 samples of length 2048; 20 epochs by default and 60 for W2A16; pretrained dense base stays frozen
updated_state: learnable channel scales and rank-4 LoRA on all linear layers; the default export absorbs both into adjacent/original weights
objective: sliding-window output reconstruction under simulated low-bit quantization
payload_must_count: exported codes/scales/zero-points; channel-scale or LoRA state only if export fails to merge it; scheme/group IDs; uncompressed exceptions; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match W-only versus W/A scope, calibration corpus and 128x2048-token budget, 20/60 epochs, optimizer, window schedule, group size, merged-state proof, actual bytes, compute, and evaluation
evidence_note: B denotes local calibration reconstruction with a frozen dense base; rank-4 LoRA here is auxiliary calibration state, not downstream PEFT.

lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: SliderQuant calibration path augmented with non-absorbable Hadamard transformations for W/A quantization
gradient_training_signal: uses the same frozen-base AdamW calibration path and local sliding-window reconstruction as SliderQuant; rotation execution is an added deployment mechanism
updated_state: fused channel scales and rank-4 LoRA plus a fixed runtime Hadamard transform plan
objective: sliding-window output reconstruction under simulated low-bit quantization with rotation transformations
payload_must_count: exported codes/scales/zero-points; any non-merged auxiliary state; transform locations and signs/seeds/factors; non-absorbable Hadamard runtime operations, kernels and workspace; scheme/group IDs; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match W/A scope, calibration and epoch budget, window/rotation protocol, actual payload, transform runtime and workspace, kernels, latency, and evaluation; do not mix with zero-extra-cost SliderQuant
evidence_note: Separated because SliderQuant+ adds non-absorbable Hadamard transformations and explicit inference-time cost.

lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: lifted low-bit weight compression with blockwise correction
gradient_training_signal: paper/README protocol says STE block correction on 4096 RedPajama samples of length 2048 and 2 epochs; the pinned parser instead exposes nsamples1/nsamples2 and epochs1/epochs2, so the executable two-stage mapping remains unresolved; no global cross-entropy
updated_state: binary lifted code Wq and fused transform T*=M T^-1; dense pretrained model otherwise frozen
objective: block output-MSE reconstruction
payload_must_count: 1-bit lifted codes including ceil(IC/d) padding; per-output scales; either fused decoder T* or unfused M plus inverse-whitening factors, following the actual artifact and never double-counting equivalent representations; uncompressed tensors; headers/alignment
comparison_conditions: paper targets 2–3-bit regimes; the current project's 4-bit Q/S/L probe is mechanism-only. A strict run must resolve README --nsamples/--epochs versus the two-stage parser, match model/data/rate, and charge stored fused T* OR stored M plus inverse factors; paper reports FP16 transform overhead about 0.008–0.011 bpw at 70B
evidence_note: Pinned 72b3875 audit: unmodified Qwen2.5 layer-0 smoke fails on missing Catcher.attention_type under Transformers 4.57; a one-line metadata-forwarding compatibility patch completes a bounded 8-window, 1+1 epoch, layer-0 smoke and writes an artifact, but no PPL/task metric or full-model reproduction was run.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: lifted low-bit compression followed by global quantization-parameter optimization
gradient_training_signal: cross-entropy optimization on 4096 samples of length 4096 for 1 epoch after block correction
updated_state: continuous quantization parameters such as scales/transforms; quantized representation retained
objective: global language-model cross-entropy
payload_must_count: 1-bit lifted codes and padding; scales; either fused T* or unfused M plus inverse-whitening factors; all other surviving optimized parameters; uncompressed tensors; headers/alignment; never double-count equivalent transform representations
comparison_conditions: paper main results use this stage, so report training corpus/tokens/steps/compute and exact payload; pinned 72b3875 e2efinetune.py cannot reach --help because datautils_block is absent, and unknown extra_args would be silently retained; it is not a strict frozen-PTQ comparison
evidence_note: Exactly separated from the block-only row: main paper results use E2E, while the repository calls it optional for deployment. The current pinned entrypoint is import-blocked and has not been executed.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ with scale/rounding search and activation-mean correction
gradient_training_signal: no backpropagation or dense fine-tuning; DSQ alternates closed-form/statistical scale and rounding updates; DAC uses calibration forwards
updated_state: quantized weights/scales plus per-layer hidden-size LayerNorm bias correction; a column scale may be absorbed when export verifies it
objective: weight reconstruction for DSQ and post-attention mean-shift cancellation for DAC
payload_must_count: base codes/scales/zero-points; DAC LayerNorm bias in its stored dtype for every layer; non-absorbed DSQ/rotation state; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match calibration, base codec, corrected layers, actual absorbed state, DAC bias bytes, artifact format, and evaluation
evidence_note: A useful small-parameter repair control: zero overhead is allowed only for a scale actually fused into an existing stored scale.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: layer-wise post-training weight quantization; also usable as the weight-quantizer step inside W/A pipelines
gradient_training_signal: no model backpropagation or parameter fine-tuning; calibration activations form H=X^T X and ADMM alternates closed-form continuous updates, quantization projections, optional grid refresh, and pair-swap local search
updated_state: final hardened quantized codes and fitted scale/zero-point; dense pretrained weights stay frozen and ADMM primal/dual iterates, eigendecomposition, Hessian, and search state are encoder-side only
objective: jointly minimize Hessian-weighted layer reconstruction error under a discrete quantization constraint
payload_must_count: packed codes; scale/zero-point; group/channel and clipping metadata; any separately deployed scaling/rotation state from the surrounding pipeline; unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment; do not charge encoder-only ADMM/Hessian state unless an exporter serializes it
comparison_conditions: match calibration tokens, Hessian damping, iteration/penalty/grid-refresh/local-search protocol, clipping and group/channel codec, surrounding transforms, actual serialized bytes, quantization time/memory, and held-out evaluation
evidence_note: ADMM is an iterative encoder-side discrete optimizer, not gradient training. The paper contains no official-code link and no author-designated repository was confirmed by the cutoff date.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ with a vector-quantized dense body and sparse high-sensitivity residual feedback
gradient_training_signal: no backpropagation or trainable model update in the official implementation; 128 length-1024 WikiText-2 calibration forwards estimate diagonal activation second moments, followed by iterative k-means on masked weight blocks
updated_state: vector index stream and codebooks for the dense body, per-channel scales, plus sparse residual values and their support; dense pretrained model otherwise frozen
objective: minimize diagonal-Hessian-weighted distortion while reconstructing selected high-sensitivity coordinates exactly up to the stored residual precision
payload_must_count: packed vector indices including block padding; every codebook centroid and dtype/dimension; channel scales; sparse residual values plus indices/bitmap/row pointers and their dtypes; sparsity/block/scheme metadata; unquantized tensors and biases; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match model, calibration samples/tokens, diagonal statistic, block size, centroid count, k-means iterations/sampling, sparsity ratio, sparse codec, actual serialized bytes, kernel/decode path, and held-out evaluation
evidence_note: The paper's BPP includes indices, codebooks, scales, and sparse residuals; strict exact-rate comparison still requires a real packed artifact rather than the analytical count used by the reference script.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only layer-wise PTQ that leaves globally selected important weights unquantized and quantizes the remaining locations
gradient_training_signal: no gradient training or STE; 128 random length-2048 C4 calibration segments form a Hessian/Cholesky proxy, then a static global mask guides closed-form column-wise error-compensation updates
updated_state: quantized codes at selected locations and updated higher-precision reserved weights at the complementary support; dense pretrained model is not fine-tuned
objective: minimize constrained second-order layer reconstruction error while protecting a static global set of high-importance weights
payload_must_count: packed quantized codes/scales/zero-points; every reserved higher-precision value and its support mask/indices unless a deployed mixed-format codec encodes support implicitly; ratio/block metadata; unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match calibration, Hessian damping/Cholesky, importance ratio, static-global mask rule, block size, reserved-value dtype, support codec, actual serialized bytes, and held-out evaluation
evidence_note: The paper states a GPTQ-based implementation but does not designate a public official repository; selective support and higher-precision reserved values must be charged explicitly.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: 4-bit weight-only PTQ with per-layer scalar codebooks
gradient_training_signal: no gradients/Hessian; calibration activation weights enter scalar k-means codebook construction
updated_state: two codebooks per layer, quantized indices, and a per-group codebook selector
objective: activation-weighted scalar clustering distortion
payload_must_count: 4-bit indices; normal scales/zero-points; two 16-entry BF16 codebooks per layer (64 bytes); selector bit per group unless safely encoded in an otherwise unused compatible scale sign bit; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match 4-bit W-only scope, calibration, grouping, selector encoding/backend semantics, actual artifact bytes, and evaluation
evidence_note: Payload rules are sourced from the paper/OpenReview artifact; no official GitHub repository was identified by the cutoff date.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A0：data-free，不使用校准样本或激活统计。
scope: data-free FP8 quantization of post-training weight deltas relative to an available base checkpoint
gradient_training_signal: no calibration activations, Hessian, or backpropagation; coarse-to-fine scale search uses base and post-trained weights
updated_state: standard FP8 quantized final model/scales; base checkpoint is an encoder-side prerequisite rather than deployment payload when already shared
objective: maximize delta sign-preservation rate and cosine similarity
payload_must_count: FP8 codes; block/per-channel scales; format metadata; padding/header/alignment; charge base checkpoint if the deployment scenario does not already possess it
comparison_conditions: narrow boundary: requires paired base/post-trained checkpoints and targets FP8 delta preservation, not generic sub-4-bit PTQ; sign/cosine are secondary diagnostics only
evidence_note: This is the 2026 Delta-Aware method, not the earlier Density-Aware DAQ; scope is intentionally narrow.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A0：data-free，不使用校准样本或激活统计。
scope: weight-only data-free selection among non-uniform, vector, and trellis-style quantization palettes
gradient_training_signal: no calibration dataset or model backpropagation for the core data-free codec/search path
updated_state: per-layer or partition quantized streams and selected codec scheme
objective: rate-distortion/information-theoretic codec selection
payload_must_count: index or trellis streams; scales; required codebooks/LUTs; layer/partition scheme IDs; incoherence-transform signs/seeds/factors when enabled; fusion/merge plan when required; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: compare actual serialized bytes, not only information-theoretic bits; match model, tensor scope, codec search, kernels, and evaluation
evidence_note: Closest exact-rate codec control in this registry; theoretical bit objectives do not substitute for packed artifact size.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ selecting mixed quantization schemes under memory or latency constraints
gradient_training_signal: no retraining or trainable-parameter update; QTIP-style proxy Hessian and calibration/validation forward losses guide quantization and scheme selection
updated_state: per-layer or partition quantized streams, selected codec scheme, and fusion plan
objective: proxy-Hessian quantization distortion plus measured validation perplexity degradation for mixed-scheme allocation
payload_must_count: index or trellis streams; scales; required codebooks/LUTs; layer/partition scheme IDs; incoherence-transform signs/seeds/factors; fusion/merge plan; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match proxy Hessian, calibration and scheme-selection data, hold selection data separate from final evaluation, memory/latency constraint, codec kernels, actual serialized bytes, and evaluation
evidence_note: Separated from the data-free row because the paper and official artifacts report a distinct data-aware protocol without retraining.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: one-shot joint weight quantization, semi-structured pruning, and low-rank repair
gradient_training_signal: no gradient training in the core one-shot path; calibration statistics support pruning/closed-form compensation
updated_state: quantized sparse base plus low-rank compensation factors
objective: recover the quantization/pruning residual with a closed-form low-rank component
payload_must_count: quantized values/scales; 2:4 mask/metadata; both low-rank factors and dtype/scales; optional adapter if used; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: use the core no-PEFT path for strict PTQ; match sparsity, rate, rank/dtype, actual sparse/repair bytes, kernels, and evaluation
evidence_note: Optional PEFT must be reported separately in lane C; this row covers only the one-shot core.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: joint quantization/sparsification with block or group residual compensation
gradient_training_signal: closed-form/statistical repair without end-to-end backpropagation
updated_state: the encoder computes group compensation and folds it into the final sparse low-bit weight before requantization; no separate compensation tensor is assumed at decode
objective: cancel reconstruction residual under the method's groupwise approximation
payload_must_count: final quantized/sparse weight codec; masks or N:M metadata; scales/zero-points; any unfused rotation; grouping metadata; padding/header/alignment; charge a compensation tensor only if an exporter actually retains one
comparison_conditions: match calibration, W/A/KV and sparsity scope, codec, grouping, folded-state proof, actual sparse layout bytes, tensor coverage, kernels and evaluation
evidence_note: ICLR 2026 OBR is a closest Hessian joint Q/S comparator. Its encoder-side compensation is folded into the exported sparse low-bit weight unless an inspected artifact proves otherwise.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: weight-only group-wise ternary quantization-aware training of pretrained LLM checkpoints
gradient_training_signal: offline Hutch++ Hessian-trace calibration followed by full-model AdamW causal-LM QAT on 10B Ultra-FineWeb tokens; a temperature-controlled softmax relaxation is progressively hardened
updated_state: latent model weights are globally optimized under the differentiable quantizer; tensor-wise temperature schedules guide training and the final target representation is ternary
objective: global causal language-model loss under Hessian-sensitive soft-to-hard quantization annealing
payload_must_count: actual packed ternary codes rather than nominal 1.58 bits; group-128 scales; codebook/quantizer metadata; every excluded full-precision tensor such as non-linear components or lm_head; any state still required by the exported runtime; padding/header/alignment; optimizer, Hessian sketches and temperature schedules are training-only and exempt only if absent from the deployed artifact
comparison_conditions: treat as a trained upper-bound track: match initialization, 10B-token corpus and sequence length, global batch/optimizer/schedule, Hutch++ calibration, tensor coverage, actual exported artifact, kernels and evaluation; never compare it as frozen PTQ
evidence_note: HESTIA belongs to C because the paper performs global causal-LM QAT; offline Hessian calibration does not turn the subsequent 10B-token AdamW optimization into PTQ.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: quantization-aware training for low-bit LLM weights and activations depending protocol
gradient_training_signal: blockwise all-parameter training followed by end-to-end quantization-parameter optimization
updated_state: model/quantizer parameters updated under simulated quantization
objective: block reconstruction and global task/distillation objectives
payload_must_count: exported codes/scales/zero-points; remaining quantizer state; any adapters; unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match W/A scope and actual bytes, but disclose training data/tokens/steps/GPU-hours/peak memory; not strict PTQ
evidence_note: Training scope places the method in C regardless of nominal deployment bit width.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: QAT covering weights, activations, and optionally KV cache
gradient_training_signal: synthetic/data-free distillation with backpropagation through quantization simulation
updated_state: student model and quantization parameters
objective: teacher-student language-model distillation under low-bit simulation
payload_must_count: all exported W/A/KV quantizer state; packed weights; scales/zero-points; unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: scope must be aligned (W-only versus W/A/KV) and training compute disclosed; not a frozen weight-PTQ control
evidence_note: Data-free describes distillation data sourcing, not absence of gradient training.

lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: runtime KV-cache compression rather than static model-weight compression
gradient_training_signal: runtime/per-sequence quantization path; training signal is not the current weight-PTQ question
updated_state: dynamic KV representation and its runtime codec state
objective: reduce KV-cache distortion/memory under vector quantization
payload_must_count: KV codes; per-sequence/block scales; vector codebooks; runtime metadata/workspace; kernel requirements
comparison_conditions: report separately as a runtime-memory axis; do not merge its rate with static weight bytes
evidence_note: Excluded from strict comparison because the compressed object is KV cache, not model weights.

variant: online activation sparse-dense FP4 decomposition with shared FP4 weights
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: runtime activation decomposition/dispatch plus a shared low-bit weight representation
gradient_training_signal: runtime mechanism; not a like-for-like static weight PTQ optimization
updated_state: input-adaptive N:M activation mask, sparse backbone, dense residual, and one shared FP4 weight payload with path-specific scale views
objective: reduce activation quantization error and execution cost using sparse/dense paths
payload_must_count: runtime activation mask/metadata; shared FP4 weight payload; path-specific scale views; runtime buffers/workspace; fused-preparation and sparse/dense GEMM kernel requirements
comparison_conditions: evaluate as activation/runtime system work, not as evidence for a weight-only exact-rate frontier
evidence_note: Scope mismatch is explicit even though the system also consumes low-bit weights.

lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: global structural pruning plus mixed-precision allocation/search
gradient_training_signal: global search/optimization across architecture and bit allocation rather than a fixed-model PTQ transform
updated_state: selected structure, layer widths/blocks, and mixed-precision weights
objective: global resource-constrained architecture/precision objective
payload_must_count: all surviving weights and quantizer state; architecture descriptors; masks/indices; search-selected scheme IDs; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: requires a separate architecture-search track; nominal global compression ratio alone is not a strict fixed-model comparison
evidence_note: Kept in lane D because structure/search changes the model definition being compared.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A0：data-free，不使用校准样本或激活统计。
scope: data-free weight-only PTQ with scaling along an additional axis
gradient_training_signal: no calibration data or gradient training for SINQ core
updated_state: quantized weights and additional-axis scale state
objective: reduce weight quantization distortion through structured rescaling
payload_must_count: codes; ordinary and second-axis scales; zero-points; axis/group metadata; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match data-free variant, scale representation, group/axis setup, actual artifact bytes, and evaluation
evidence_note: Only the data-free SINQ variant is represented here; extra-axis scales must be charged.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: calibration-assisted weight-only PTQ
gradient_training_signal: calibration statistics but no end-to-end gradient training in the identified variant
updated_state: quantized weights and additional-axis scale state
objective: activation-aware quantization distortion reduction
payload_must_count: codes; ordinary and second-axis scales; zero-points; axis/group metadata; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: match calibration, scale representation, actual bytes, group/axis setup, and evaluation
evidence_note: Separated from calibration-free SINQ to prevent mixing A0 and A1 evidence.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ preserving dominant activation-scaled singular directions with low-rank residual repair
gradient_training_signal: calibration statistics/closed-form decomposition without end-to-end training in the PTQ core
updated_state: quantized residual representation and low-rank repair factors
objective: preserve selected activation-sensitive singular directions and reconstruct remaining error
payload_must_count: base codec; both low-rank factors and dtype/scales; selected-rank metadata; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: use PTQ core without QPEFT; match calibration, ranks, factor precision, actual bytes, and evaluation
evidence_note: The optional QPEFT route would belong in lane C and is not conflated with this row.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ with sequential output-aligned residual compensation
gradient_training_signal: calibration forward/statistical correction; no gradient claim is used for this registry row
updated_state: quantized weights plus any compensation state surviving export
objective: align each quantized step with the original full-precision output using compensation-aware error
payload_must_count: ordinary codec; every non-folded compensation tensor; order/scheme metadata; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: verify whether compensation is truly folded and measure exported bytes; match calibration, codec, and evaluation
evidence_note: No zero-overhead claim is assumed: exported artifacts decide whether compensation payload survives.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A1：使用校准样本、激活统计或闭式二阶量，但不做梯度更新。
scope: weight-only PTQ with first-order-aware error compensation
gradient_training_signal: no explicit model backpropagation; uses latent/full-weight difference and Hessian-like calibration surrogate
updated_state: progressively compensated latent weights hardened into the final quantized weights; the paper algorithm adds no separate deployed FOEM state
objective: approximate loss with both first-order and second-order perturbation terms
payload_must_count: base codes/scales/zero-points; grouping/order metadata; padding/header/alignment; charge implementation-specific compensation only if an exporter actually serializes non-folded state
comparison_conditions: match calibration, codec, serialized compensation, actual bytes, and evaluation; report first-order diagnostics separately
evidence_note: The paper-designated repository is Xingyu-Zheng/FOEM; ModelCloud/GPTQModel is only a secondary integration. FOEM is a relevant control because a Hessian-only proxy can miss the linear term.

lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: weight PTQ with full-model KL Kronecker curvature sketches and fixed-point adaptive rounding
gradient_training_signal: backward/HVP-like Hessian-sketch collection may use calibration KL information, but the quantized representation is produced by fixed-point/LDL-style rounding without gradient learning; dense base stays frozen
updated_state: hardened quantized codes selected inside the underlying quantizer; no learnable YAQA rounding state survives export
objective: minimize full-model output KL under a structured curvature approximation
payload_must_count: only the underlying quantizer payload: codes/scales/zero-points, its required transform/codebook/decoder metadata, and padding/header/alignment; YAQA Hessian sketches, curvature factors and rounding search state are encoder-side and absent at inference
comparison_conditions: match calibration corpus/tokens, Hessian sketch type/rank and HVP cost, fixed-point/LDL rounding protocol, underlying quantizer, actual exported bytes, compute, and evaluation
evidence_note: Placed in B because collecting full-model KL curvature can require backward/HVP work; this is gradient-assisted statistics, not gradient learning or fine-tuning.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A0：data-free，不使用校准样本或激活统计。
scope: post-training sparsity/quantization interaction theory with LLM and vision experiments
gradient_training_signal: the core order/error analysis uses deterministic magnitude sparsity and max-scaled numerical encoding without calibration gradients
updated_state: a sparse quantized tensor; no separate repair state is introduced by the core analysis
objective: decompose the compounded dot-product error and characterize when sparsity and quantization are non-orthogonal and order dependent
payload_must_count: quantized values/scales; sparse values and mask/index or N:M metadata; ordering/format descriptors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: use as the closest interaction-theory prior; a numerical comparison must match sparsity structure, quantizer, order, actual serialized bytes, model/tensors and evaluation
evidence_note: ICLR 2025 Spotlight already proves and measures Q/S non-orthogonality and order effects, and the author project page links the official implementation. The current repository may claim a different signed PSD-cross-term and physical-byte audit, not first interaction or orthogonality analysis.

lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: network weight quantization under a compression-ratio or entropy constraint
gradient_training_signal: diagonal task-Hessian weighting requires second-order/backward information; the paper also studies post-quantization fine-tuning, which must be separated from the core codec comparison
updated_state: cluster/code indices, reproduction values/codebook and a variable-length binary code
objective: minimize Hessian-weighted distortion subject to rate through entropy-constrained scalar quantization
payload_must_count: variable-length codewords or Huffman tree/code lengths; codebook/LUT; tensor shapes; scales if used; all headers, alignment and padding
comparison_conditions: historical non-LLM scope; match Hessian computation, codebook, entropy coder, complete file bytes and exclude fine-tuning before using it as a frozen-compression comparator
evidence_note: ICLR 2017 already combines Hessian-weighted distortion, a compression constraint and Huffman/ECSQ. Therefore Hessian-plus-rate or Hessian-plus-entropy is not a base novelty claim.

lane_definition: A：冻结稠密模型、无反向传播的 PTQ；A0：data-free，不使用校准样本或激活统计。
scope: weight-format design and lossless coding after scalar quantization
gradient_training_signal: distributional format analysis and direct-cast quantization do not require model training
updated_state: quantized values encoded by a variable-length code and the decoder format state
objective: minimize squared error or KL-linked distortion at an expected code length
payload_must_count: actual code stream; symbol table/codebook or canonical code lengths; block/outlier descriptors; tensor metadata; headers/alignment/padding
comparison_conditions: match source weights, format family, entropy coder, decode state, complete serialized bytes, tensor coverage and evaluation
evidence_note: The paper shows that uniform quantization followed by variable-length lossless coding is optimal in its stated model. It reports average/sample code length rather than this repository's self-describing artifact bytes.

lane_definition: B：冻结 dense pretrained base 的校准型 PTQ；允许为局部重构、曲率统计执行 backward/HVP/STE，或优化最终可融合的量化/辅助状态，但不做全局任务恢复。
scope: mixed-rate allocation across model parameter tensors
gradient_training_signal: Fisher information links output KL to weighted parameter distortion and can require loss-gradient statistics
updated_state: per-tensor quantized streams and the selected bit-width/format allocation
objective: minimize Fisher-weighted distortion under an aggregate expected-rate constraint
payload_must_count: every per-tensor stream; bit-width/format identifiers; scales/codebooks; Fisher statistics only if required at decode; headers/alignment/padding
comparison_conditions: match the Fisher corpus/objective and backward cost, candidate formats, aggregate physical bytes, tensor scope and evaluation
evidence_note: Separated from the paper's data-free format analysis because Fisher allocation is a gradient/statistics-assisted rate allocator.

variant: orthogonal projection for quantization and low-rank adapters
lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: adapter-aware quantization whose error is shaped toward a low-rank subspace before downstream adaptation
gradient_training_signal: the main evaluation includes low-rank adaptation/fine-tuning; the alternating projection mechanism must be isolated before any frozen-PTQ comparison
updated_state: quantized base plus low-rank adapter/correction factors and any projection state that is not folded
objective: push quantization noise into the adapter-correctable subspace while reducing the orthogonal residual
payload_must_count: base quantizer payload; both low-rank factors; projection/basis state unless regenerated or folded; adapter metadata; headers/alignment/padding
comparison_conditions: separate frozen compensation from downstream LoRA, match rank/training budget, projection state, actual artifact bytes, model/tensors and evaluation
evidence_note: ProjQ already uses orthogonal subspace projection for quantization plus low-rank adaptation, so orthogonality-based low-rank coordination is not a first claim.

lane_definition: C：使用全局 CE/KL 梯度优化、QAT、下游 PEFT/微调，或主结果流水线以任务损失恢复全模型行为。
scope: quantization-aware fine-tuning/training across low-bit regimes
gradient_training_signal: gradient-based QAT or fine-tuning
updated_state: model and quantizer parameters
objective: task/distillation loss under quantization simulation
payload_must_count: exported codes/scales/zero-points; retained quantizer/adaptation state; unquantized tensors; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: use as a trained upper-bound/frontier with training compute disclosed, not as a strict frozen-PTQ control
evidence_note: Training regime, rather than deployment bit width, determines lane C.

variant: video-DiT weight/activation quantization with temporal distillation
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: video diffusion Transformer quantization and distillation
gradient_training_signal: calibration and temporal-maintenance distillation optimize a video-generation objective; this is not the current frozen decoder-only LLM weight endpoint
updated_state: quantized video-DiT weights/activations plus estimator or distillation-trained state retained by export
objective: preserve token/feature information and spatiotemporal consistency under video-DiT quantization
payload_must_count: weight codes/scales; activation quantizer state; token-aware estimator state if retained; unquantized exceptions; runtime kernels/workspace; headers/padding/alignment
comparison_conditions: compare only in a video-DiT W/A deployment track with matched model, prompts, frames, denoising protocol, hardware, exported bytes, peak memory, latency, and video quality
evidence_note: Primary sources describe a video-generation PTQ/distillation system. It informs the multimodal extension but is not a direct weight-only language-model PTQ baseline.

variant: salient calibration and sparse-token distillation for W/A quantization
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: video diffusion Transformer weight/activation quantization
gradient_training_signal: Hessian-aware calibration selection and attention-guided sparse-token distillation are encoder/training procedures
updated_state: quantized video-DiT weights and activation quantizer state; sparse-token selection is not asserted as runtime sparse attention
objective: improve W/A PTQ calibration and distillation for long video token sequences
payload_must_count: weight codes/scales; activation quantizer state; retained calibration/distillation state if any; unquantized exceptions; runtime kernels/workspace; headers/padding/alignment
comparison_conditions: keep training-time sparse-token distillation separate from runtime sparse attention; match video model, W/A scope, calibration, prompts, frames, steps, bytes, memory, latency, and quality
evidence_note: The paper reports W4A6 video-DiT PTQ. Sparse tokens guide distillation during calibration and must not be counted as deployed sparse-attention acceleration.

variant: joint model quantization and attention sparsification
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: HunyuanVideo-class video diffusion Transformer W/A quantization plus runtime sparse attention
gradient_training_signal: multi-scale salient attention distillation and second-order sparse-attention reparameterization jointly correct coupled quantization/sparsity error
updated_state: quantized model state, sparse-attention policy/reparameterization state, and any retained distillation-derived parameters
objective: jointly preserve global attention structure and local salient information under quantization and attention sparsity
payload_must_count: weight/activation quantizer payload; sparse support/index or routing state; reparameterization state; dense fallbacks; kernels/workspace; headers/padding/alignment
comparison_conditions: use a matched video-generation system protocol and report storage, runtime state, peak memory, attention-only and end-to-end latency separately; never multiply standalone speedups
evidence_note: This is the closest joint video quantization-plus-sparse-attention precedent. The official repository contains paper assets and says code will be released soon, so paper numbers remain literature-reported.

lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: training-free temporal cache for video diffusion inference
gradient_training_signal: no model training in the core method; timestep-modulated input differences and rescaling decide cache reuse
updated_state: cached intermediate outputs and cache-control thresholds/statistics at runtime
objective: skip redundant denoising computation while bounding timestep-dependent output change
payload_must_count: cache buffers; cache keys/timestep state; thresholds/rescaling parameters; fallback compute; kernels/workspace; peak runtime memory
comparison_conditions: cache latency and memory must be measured under the same video model, prompts, frames, denoising steps, hardware, warmup, and quality protocol
evidence_note: TeaCache is a cache-only video diffusion system reference, not a stored-weight compression endpoint.

lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: training-free runtime sparse attention for video diffusion Transformers
gradient_training_signal: online profiling classifies heads and predicts dynamic spatial or temporal sparse patterns; no dense-weight PTQ is implied
updated_state: head classifiers/profiling state, sparse layouts, and custom sparse-attention kernels
objective: preserve attention output while exploiting dynamic spatial-versus-temporal head structure
payload_must_count: sparse layouts/indices; profiling and classifier state; dense fallback; layout transforms; kernels/workspace; peak runtime memory
comparison_conditions: report attention-only and end-to-end latency separately with matched sequence length, hardware, kernel version, prompts, frames, steps, and quality
evidence_note: Dynamic head type and online profiling make this a runtime attention-system comparison rather than a fixed weight-codec row.

variant: offline searched diagonal, multi-diagonal, and vertical-stripe attention
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: structured sparse attention and hardware-aware search for video diffusion Transformers
gradient_training_signal: offline search selects per-head/layer sparse strategies; the method changes runtime attention rather than only stored weights
updated_state: per-head pattern assignments, fused sparse layouts, search-selected schedule, and custom kernels
objective: minimize hardware cost while preserving video attention under recurring structured sparsity
payload_must_count: pattern descriptors; sparse layouts/indices; skipped-head metadata; dense fallback; kernels/workspace; peak runtime memory
comparison_conditions: match model, head/layer schedule, sequence geometry, hardware cost model, kernels, prompts, frames, steps, and video quality; distinguish theoretical FLOPs from measured latency
evidence_note: The primary paper reports model-specific structured patterns and measured video inference speedups, but no official repository was confirmed in the audited primary sources.

lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: training-free image diffusion cache plus model quantization
gradient_training_signal: dynamic programming chooses a cache schedule and decoupled error correction addresses coupled and accumulated cache/quantization error
updated_state: quantized model state, cache schedule/controller state, correction state, and runtime cache buffers
objective: jointly optimize temporal reuse and structural quantization rather than independently stacking them
payload_must_count: quantized codes/scales; cache buffers and schedule; correction/controller state; unquantized exceptions; kernels/workspace; headers/padding/alignment
comparison_conditions: use as interaction-aware stacking precedent; image-diffusion results require new video-model validation with matched storage, cache memory, latency, and quality accounting
evidence_note: CacheQuant directly shows that independently optimized cache and quantization errors are not orthogonal. Its measured scope is image diffusion, not HunyuanVideo.

variant: structured Monarch attention for video diffusion
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: structured attention replacement for video diffusion Transformers
gradient_training_signal: alternating minimization, recomputation, and minimal tuning fit structured Monarch attention; this changes the model/runtime attention operator
updated_state: Monarch factors, update/recomputation state, and fused attention kernels
objective: capture intra-frame and inter-frame dynamic sparsity with a sub-quadratic structured matrix
payload_must_count: all Monarch factors; update state retained at inference; position/layout metadata; dense fallbacks; kernels/workspace; peak runtime memory
comparison_conditions: separate attention FLOPs and attention-kernel speed from end-to-end generation speed; match tuning budget, model, sequence geometry, hardware, and quality
evidence_note: VMonarch is evidence for structured local/global attention, but its reported attention-compute gains are not an end-to-end compression result.

variant: periodic structured, dynamic sparse, and dense-mixing attention
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: finetuned structured attention for real-time autoregressive video diffusion
gradient_training_signal: finetuning and custom kernels fit a tiled Monarch parameterization to periodic position structure, dynamic sparse semantics, and dense mixing
updated_state: trained Monarch factors, tiled layout metadata, and custom Triton kernels
objective: retain expressive mixed attention structure while reducing real-time video attention cost
payload_must_count: trained factors; tiling/position metadata; dense-mixing state; kernels/workspace; peak runtime memory; model checkpoint delta
comparison_conditions: report kernel and full-pipeline speed separately; match finetuning data/steps, autoregressive regime, model, hardware, frames, and quality
evidence_note: The paper argues that sparse semantics alone are insufficient because periodic structure and dense mixing remain. Kernel speedups must not be presented as end-to-end multipliers.

variant: 3D-RoPE sparse semantic spikes plus low-rank background
lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: sparse-low-rank attention replacement for long-sequence video diffusion Transformers
gradient_training_signal: head-wise low-rank parameterization and learned 3D absolute positional injection preserve RoPE-aware structure alongside sparse semantic spikes
updated_state: sparse routes/support, low-rank attention factors, positional parameters, and runtime kernels
objective: decompose attention into high-frequency sparse semantics and an extreme low-rank background continuum
payload_must_count: sparse support/index or routing state; low-rank factors; positional parameters; dense fallbacks; kernels/workspace; peak runtime memory
comparison_conditions: match sequence length, sparsity/rank, model, training or calibration budget, hardware, kernels, prompts, frames, steps, and quality; verify held-out transfer of the decomposition
evidence_note: RoPeSLR is the closest external sparse-plus-low-rank attention analogue to the proposed spectral gate, but it is not a weight Q/S/L artifact comparison.

lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: model architecture/training designed natively for ternary weights
gradient_training_signal: full pretraining or training from scratch in the low-bit architecture
updated_state: entire native low-bit model
objective: language-model training objective with ternary-weight constraints
payload_must_count: ternary weight encoding; scales; non-ternary tensors; architecture/runtime metadata; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: compare only in a separately trained-model track; it is not post-hoc compression of the same pretrained checkpoint
evidence_note: Native low-bit training cannot establish orthogonality or repair gains for fixed-checkpoint PTQ.

lane_definition: D：非同范围；KV-cache、仅激活、原生低比特训练、NAS/结构搜索等不能作为严格权重 PTQ 对照。
scope: training-aware low-bit weights-and-activations system
gradient_training_signal: gradient-based native or quantization-aware training
updated_state: trained low-bit model and activation quantizers
objective: training loss under low-bit weight/activation simulation
payload_must_count: weight codes/scales; activation quantizer state; non-quantized tensors; runtime/kernel requirements; padding/header/alignment
comparison_conditions: use a separately trained W/A track; do not treat as frozen weight-only PTQ at equal nominal bits
evidence_note: Lane D captures both training-regime and compressed-object mismatch with the current weight-only PTQ probe.
